query:
SELECT 'users' AS tbl, COUNT(*) AS rows FROM users
UNION ALL SELECT 'subscribers', COUNT(*) FROM subscribers
UNION ALL SELECT 'sent_alerts', COUNT(*) FROM sent_alerts
UNION ALL SELECT 'freight_lanes', COUNT(*) FROM freight_lanes
UNION ALL SELECT 'lane_carriers', COUNT(*) FROM lane_carriers
UNION ALL SELECT 'risk_forecasts', COUNT(*) FROM risk_forecasts;
